title: Non-record unlimited-compute: 1-hour 1xH100 warmdown 9x512
body:
Adds one non-record submission folder under records/track_non_record_16mb with README, submission.json, train.log, and train_gpt.py.

Highlights:
- 1-hour 1xH100 run (unlimited-compute non-record track).
- val_bpb improved to 1.25402600 from earlier 10-minute best 1.34862689 (improvement 0.09460089).
- Artifact remains under 16,000,000 bytes total.
- Run performed on 1x H100 due to limited compute budget while awaiting grant-backed 8xH100 runs.
